_comment: Bundled starter library — deliberately generic sample recipes so the repo clones-and-runs with zero setup. Plain descriptive dish names with simple directions; no cuisine-authenticity claims (the `cuisine` field is left for imported recipes that carry one, e.g. Plan to Eat). Ingredient overlaps (onion/garlic/canned tomatoes/ground beef/chicken) are intentional so the overlap optimizer has signal, and a Side, a Sauce, and a Dessert are included so the main-course filter has clear non-mains.

recipes.title: Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.directions: Cook the rice. Slice the chicken and vegetables. Stir-fry the chicken in the oil until cooked through, add the peppers, onion, and garlic, then the soy sauce. Serve over rice.

recipes.title: Sheet-Pan Chicken & Peppers
recipes.directions: Slice the chicken, peppers, and onion. Toss with the garlic and a little oil and roast on a sheet pan until the chicken is cooked. Squeeze lime over and serve with warm tortillas.

recipes.title: Beef Chili
recipes.directions: Brown the beef with the onion and garlic. Stir in the chili powder, then the tomatoes and beans. Simmer 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.

recipes.title: Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
recipes.directions: Brown the beef with the onion and garlic. Add the tomatoes and simmer. Cook the spaghetti and toss with the sauce.

recipes.title: Chickpea & Spinach Stew
recipes.directions: Cook the rice. Sauté the onion and garlic, then add the chickpeas, tomatoes, and coconut milk and simmer. Stir in the spinach until wilted. Serve over rice.

recipes.title: Cucumber & Feta Salad
recipes.directions: Chop the cucumber, tomato, and red onion. Toss with the olives, crumbled feta, and a little olive oil.

recipes.title: Tomato & Basil Pizza
recipes.directions: Stretch the dough, spread crushed tomatoes, and top with mozzarella. Bake until bubbling, then scatter basil over the top.

recipes.title: Roast Chicken
recipes.directions: Season the chicken, tuck the lemon and garlic inside, and roast with the carrots and potatoes until cooked through and the juices run clear.

recipes.title: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.directions: Simmer the carrots, celery, and onion in broth until soft. Add the cooked chicken and noodles and cook until the noodles are tender.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.directions: Brown the beef with the onion, garlic, and seasoning. Serve in warm tortillas with cheddar and shredded lettuce.

recipes.title: Veggie Fried Rice
recipes.directions: Scramble the eggs and set aside. Fry the rice with the peas, carrots, and onion, add the soy sauce, then fold the eggs back in.

recipes.title: Tomato & Mozzarella Pasta
recipes.directions: Cook the penne. Toss with chopped tomatoes, torn mozzarella, basil, and a little olive oil.

recipes.title: Poached Eggs in Tomato Sauce
recipes.directions: Sauté the pepper, onion, and garlic. Add the tomatoes and simmer, make wells in the sauce, crack in the eggs, and cook until set.

recipes.title: Lemon-Herb Salmon
recipes.directions: Season the salmon with the garlic and lemon. Roast with the asparagus until the salmon flakes easily.

recipes.title: Quick Tomato Sauce
recipes.directions: Sauté the onion and garlic in the oil, add the tomatoes, and simmer until thickened. Stir in torn basil.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.directions: Cream the butter and sugar, beat in the eggs and vanilla, mix in the flour, and fold in the chips. Bake until golden.
